name: Butterscotch Grahams
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup firmly packed light brown sugar
recipeInstructions:
1. Place crackers on a baking sheet.
2. Combine butter and brown sugar in a saucepan over medium heat. Melt the mixture and stir in the pecans until well combined.
3. Drop spoonfuls of the mixture onto the crackers.
4. Bake at 350 degrees F (175 degrees C) for 8 minutes in the oven.
5. Cool, then eat! Makes 30 pieces.
